down.Description: Is this...the afterlife? The great beyond? My final reckoning? Nah, it still hurts like I'm alive... And I'm alive thanks to this weird inflated cloth! Talk about helpful, unlike that dastardly Link! How dare he foil the secret technique of the leader of the Yiga Clan! Grrrr... Hang on. Maybe I'm in the Depths... That's where a buncha ancient people lived. Maybe?
down.cn: 难道这里是……死后的世界？彼岸？我最后的审判？不，还像活着一样会痛……多亏了这块奇怪的会膨胀的布，我还活着！真是帮大忙了，不像那个卑鄙的林克！竟敢挫败我这个依盖队首领的秘密技法！可恶……等等。难道我在地底……这里好像住着一群古代人。也许吧？

down.Description: This place is waaay too dark! Maybe if these dim, glowing things could get brighter...or if this green...crest thingy reacted at all! And what even is this—some kind of massive plant? It goes so far up... Does it reach all the way from here to the surface?!
down.cn: 这个地方也太暗了吧！要是这些昏暗的发光体能再亮一点……或者这个绿色的……徽章一样的东西能有点反应就好了！这到底是什么——某种巨大的植物吗？它长得那么高……难道能从这里一直延伸到地表？！

down.Description: Hoho! It shook a little there! But touching it also sent a shiver down MY spine. Huh... Maybe they're...spirits? But if they are, then th-that means this IS the afterlife!
down.cn: 嚯嚯！它刚才晃了一下！但触摸它的时候，我的脊背也感到一阵寒意。嗯……难道它们是……灵魂？但如果是的话，那岂不意味着这里就是死后的世界！

down.Description: What's this floating green thing? Hrm...huff... This some kinda bottle? What's inside? I'll just... JUST... Fine! Don't open! I'm still gonna hang on to you. My sixth sense says you're important.
down.cn: 这个漂浮的绿色东西是什么？哼……呼……这是某种瓶子吗？里面装了什么？我只要……只要……好吧！打不开就算了！我还是会带着你的。我的第六感告诉我你很重要。

down.Description: Hrm. This some kinda ancient doodad? It's flat there and pointed here... Huuup... Aah, my butt! Ow, what a terrible seat. Oh, take this, terrible seat. Ha! Gah! ...Wh-what? Why are you glowing?
down.cn: 嗯。这是某种古代的小玩意儿吗？这边是平的，这边是尖的……嘿咻……啊，我的屁股！噢，这座位太糟糕了。哦，吃我一招，糟糕的座位。哈！呀！……什、什么？你为什么在发光？

down.Description: Aha, more ancient doodads! lots like the last one too... Crazy thing firing off into the air scared the bananas outta me. Huh... I bet the ancients used them to get around! Which means...I can too! C'mere, round thingy! Time to show Master Kohga what you can do. Hee-yah!
down.cn: 啊哈，更多古代的小玩意儿！和上一个很像……那疯狂地射向空中的东西把我吓得魂飞魄散。嗯……我敢打赌古代人用它们来移动！也就是说……我也可以！过来，圆东西！是时候让可盖大人看看你的能耐了。嘿呀！

down.Description: Ooo, this is a new mushroom! I've never seen anything like it on the surface... Maybe just one little bite. Ack! What is this smoke?! I can't see anything... Oh, just like a smoke screen! I should hang on to a few of these for the next time things are looking dicey...
down.cn: 哦哦，这是种新蘑菇！我在地表上从没见过这样的东西……或许可以尝一小口。呀！这是什么烟？！我什么都看不见了……哦，就像烟幕弹一样！我应该留几个，以备下次情况不妙时使用……

down.Voice Memory: Invitation to Join the Yiga Clan
down.Description: OK, so there are Bokoblins down here... And they're smart enough to mine for...something...using tools... But they attack me right away. Here I thought faithful servants of the Magnificent One would want to be friends... Could have at least talked first...
down.cn: 好吧，原来这里有波克布林……而且它们还挺聪明，会用工具开采……某种东西……但它们一上来就攻击我。我还以为那位大人的忠实仆人会想交朋友呢……至少可以先谈谈嘛……

down.Description: Heh, good riddance to those Bokoblins... I guess they don't like this light. I was going to let them join my new Yiga Clan Depths Squad, but they definitely like attacking me too much. Makes me miss the Yiga Clan. I wonder what they're up to...
down.cn: 嘿，总算摆脱那些波克布林了……我猜它们不喜欢这光。我本打算让他们加入我新的依盖队地底小队，但他们实在太喜欢攻击我了。这让我想念依盖队了。不知道他们现在在干什么……

down.Description: What's the deal with this place? The furnace is blazing away but no one to be seen... Though from a distance, it did look like this green thing was moving! Hm. Maybe I should go find something to eat. Things will go bad if I start hallucinating.
down.cn: 这个地方是怎么回事？熔炉烧得正旺，却一个人影都看不见……不过从远处看，这个绿色的东西确实像在动！嗯。也许我该去找点吃的。如果开始出现幻觉就糟了。

down.Description: Ah-ha! Is THIS the source of that horrible, rotting smell? It. Is. AWFUL. I can't stand it. I hate it! I...don't want to stop smelling it. Whoa. Little bit dizzy all of a... Hey, over there! Those aren't Bokoblins—they're Yiga! Guys! GUUUYS!
down.cn: 啊哈！这就是那股可怕的、腐烂气味的来源吗？简直。太。难闻了。我受不了了。我讨厌它！我……却不想停止闻它。哇哦。突然有点头晕……嘿，那边！那些不是波克布林——是依盖队的人！伙计们！伙计们！

down.Description: Is that... At last! Someone to help me! There are Bokoblins chasing... Huh? Coulda sworn there was someone here... Grrr! No one tells you how lonely solitude is... I'd even accept the company of that Link character... NO! What am I saying? I'll never forgive him for casting me down into the Depths! Never!
down.cn: 那是……终于！有人来帮我了！有波克布林在追……嗯？我发誓刚才这里有人的……可恶！没人告诉过你独处有多么孤独……我甚至愿意接受那个叫林克的家伙的陪伴……不！我在说什么？我永远不会原谅他把我扔到地底！永远！

down.Description: Ugh, I was SURE this one was a person. But nope, just another statue. Figures... Hey, there are a lot of statues down here. Maybe I'll just head from one to the next, starting with where this one is looking. I haven't got anywhere else to be...
down.cn: 唉，我确信这个是个人。但结果不是，又是一座雕像。果然……嘿，这里下面有好多雕像。也许我就从一个雕像走向下一个，就从这个雕像看的方向开始吧。反正我也没别的地方可去……

down.Description: Oh good, more ruins. Couldn't be an actual village, could it? Hrmph, and no water either. I keep hallucinating Yiga calling out to me. "Kohga... Kohga..." Feels like yesterday that I inherited that name... So long ago—that smell! That's...banana, set out to ripen for five days! JUST HOW I LIKE IT. It must be them! Yiga Clan! GUYS?!
down.cn: 哦，太好了，又是废墟。总不可能是个真正的村庄吧？哼，连水都没有。我一直幻听依盖队的人在叫我。“可盖……可盖……”感觉就像昨天我才继承了这个名字……那么久以前——那味道！那是……香蕉，放了五天催熟的！正是我喜欢的味道。一定是他们！依盖队！伙计们？！

down.Description: The Yiga are gathering critical bananas—I mean supplies—for us to set up the Depths branch of the Yiga Clan. While they do that, I need to figure out how this device works. Cloth with a hole at the bottom... What if I put fire here? Hmm... Uh huh... Oh! Oh, no! S-stop! Don't fly away!
down.cn: 依盖队正在为我们建立依盖队地底分部收集关键的香蕉——我是说物资。在他们做这些的时候，我需要搞清楚这个装置是怎么工作的。一块底部有洞的布……如果我在这里放火会怎么样？嗯……嗯哼……哦！哦，不！停、停下！别飞走了！

down.Description: Is this some kinda grave... Hmm... No bones though. Not a grave after all, are you? I bet you're hiding something... Aha! A treasure chest, ha ha! Now I'll just...open... Grr! Rusted! Anything else here? Ah, a notebook! I can't read the letters, but...... Hehehe, I know what this is! It seems luck hasn't abandoned me yet!
down.cn: 这是某种坟墓吗……嗯……不过没有骨头。看来你终究不是坟墓，对吧？我敢打赌你藏了什么东西……啊哈！一个宝箱，哈哈！现在我只要……打开……可恶！生锈了！这里还有别的东西吗？啊，一本笔记！我看不懂上面的字，但是……嘿嘿嘿，我知道这是什么！看来运气还没抛弃我！

down.Description: Nuh-uh, hehehe! You can't fool me! This place has all the makings of a trap. See, if I get closer, like this... There! Trap sprung! Haha! So easy to— Hey, what are you— S-stop it! I don't wanna fight you!
down.cn: 不不，嘿嘿嘿！你骗不了我！这个地方处处都像个陷阱。看，如果我再靠近一点，像这样……有了！陷阱触发了！哈哈！太容易了——嘿，你干什么——住、住手！我不想和你打！

down.Description: Whoooa. I've seen some big skeletons in Gerudo Desert, but I don't think I've run into anything like that down here... Hm. Hmmmmmm. If the surface and the Depths are connected, then that means the creatures living up above could come down here! I think!
down.cn: 哇哦。我在格鲁德沙漠见过一些大骨架，但我不觉得在这里下面见过这样的东西……嗯。嗯嗯嗯嗯嗯。如果地表和地底是相连的，那就意味着生活在上面的生物可以下来这里！我想是这样！

down.Description: The pictures in that book from the graveyard were very, very clear. These things all attach in different ways to make something else! So if I this cloth...connect it to the platform...put this wind-blowing thing here... Ha! Then if I lit a fire under it, It'd work! Hehehe... Yeah, I need to study this notebook. Time to head to the hole under the hideout!
down.cn: 那本从墓地里找到的书里的图画非常非常清晰。这些东西以不同的方式连接在一起，可以制造出别的东西！所以如果我把这块布……连接到平台上……把这个吹风的东西放在这里……哈！然后如果我在下面点火，它就能工作了！嘿嘿嘿……是啊，我得研究研究这本笔记。该去藏身处下面的洞里了！

down.Voice Memory: Building Up the Yiga Clan Empire
down.Description: Hehehe... OK, so I think it'll work to set up a base here, close to the hideout... But what do I do about that graveyard notebook? The drawings in it are ab-so-lutely schematics of some kind...but they look like impossible, unbuildable wastes of time... BUT! If they aren't... I should explore the Depths some more...
down.cn: 嘿嘿嘿……好吧，我想在这里建一个基地是可行的，离藏身处很近……但那本墓地笔记该怎么办？里面的图纸绝对是某种设计图……但它们看起来像是无法建造、浪费时间的东西……但是！如果它们不是呢……我应该再多探索一下地底……

down.Description: Yooou big, stupid toad thing! Why do you have good-looking ore on your head if you're just gonna try and eat me when I check it out?! I hope you like that bomb flower I gave you! I hope it gives you gas!
down.cn: 你这个又大又蠢的蛤蟆东西！你头上长着好看的矿石，为什么我一查看你就要吃我？！希望你喜欢我给你的炸弹花！希望它让你胀气！

down.Description: The notebook had info about this thing, I'm sure. What page was that? Ummm...ummm... Aha! Here we go. According to these pictures, this creature gets all...person shaped when you get too close. Must be some kind of guard? It's got glowing red eyes, and those are ALWAYS bad news. I'll...keep my distance.
down.cn: 我确定，笔记里有关于这个东西的信息。是哪一页来着？嗯……嗯……啊哈！找到了。根据这些图画，当你靠得太近时，这个生物会变得……像人一样。肯定是某种守卫吧？它有发光的红眼睛，那总是坏消息。我还是……保持距离吧。

down.Voice Memory: They Shall Be Called Zonai Devices!
down.Description: I bet the notebook I found belonged to a Zonai. And if I'm right about that, then...this shape must be "zo," and I think this one is "na," and THIS is "i." Hmmm... "De...vice..." "Zonai device..." Zonai device! Yeah, that seems right, and I don't care if it isn't!
down.cn: 我敢打赌我找到的笔记是属于一个左纳乌的。如果我猜对了，那么……这个形状一定是“zo”，我想这个是“na”，而这个是“i”。嗯嗯嗯……“De...vice……”“Zonai device……”左纳乌装置！是啊，听起来很对，就算不对我也不在乎！

down.Description: So... Obviously this was meant to send things to the surface. What I don't understand is how it moves things through the ground. The pictures in the notebook look like it just...happens. They just...go through. Grrr... I don't get it! And I can't use this to send stuff to a base on the surface if I can't figure it out!
down.cn: 所以……很明显，这是用来把东西送到地表的。我不明白的是它如何让东西穿过地面。笔记里的图画看起来就像它……自然而然地发生了。它们就这么……穿过去了。可恶……我不懂！如果我搞不明白，我就没法用它把东西送到地表的基地！

down.Description: Annnd there's the face. Hm. You're not in the notebook. Does that mean the Zonai didn't make you? And how'd you get turned to stone, anyway? Maybe the Goddess did it because you did something bad... Well, bad by her standards. And if she didn't like you, I bet we woulda gotten along.
down.cn: 然后……脸出现了。嗯。你不在笔记里。这是否意味着左纳乌没有制造你？话说回来，你是怎么变成石头的？也许是女神干的，因为你做了坏事……嗯，按她的标准是坏事。如果她不喜欢你，我敢打赌我们肯定能合得来。

down.Description: Ho ho ho! Look at this level ground! And cliffs on all sides... This would be the perfect spot for a base! I...would have to get rid of those statues though. Oh! And replace them with statues of me! But...what poses would be best? Maybe...THIS! Or I could do...HA! What about—wait. Is that growling? Ah! What is THAT?! AAH!
down.cn: 嚯嚯嚯！看这平坦的地面！四面都是悬崖……这里简直是基地的完美地点！不过……我得把那些雕像弄走。哦！然后换成我的雕像！但是……什么姿势最好呢？也许……这个！或者我可以……哈！要不——等等。那是什么在咆哮？啊！那是什么？！啊啊啊！

down.Description: Whoa, yes! There we go! Finally, a stick-shaped Zonai device that looks like it could steer things! Like a...steering stick! With this, the Yiga Clan will be able to use Zonai Devices with only a little bit of training! Plus, now I can try making this bird-like thing from the notebook...
down.cn: 哇，太好了！就是这个！终于，一个像棍子一样的左纳乌装置，看起来可以用来操控东西！就像……一个操纵杆！有了这个，依盖队只需要稍加训练就能使用左纳乌装置了！另外，现在我可以试试做笔记里那个像鸟一样的东西了……

down.Description: Ugh... No, no I can't keep going. It's too hot... What's the deal? This place feels like it's under Death Mountain... Whew... Yeah, no fireproof elixirs on me, and I don't see any fireproof lizards around... Definitely...phew...definitely time we head back!
down.cn: 呃……不，不行，我走不动了。太热了……怎么回事？感觉这个地方在死亡之山下面……呼……是啊，我身上没有防火药，也看不到任何防火蜥蜴……绝对……呼……绝对该回去了！

down.Description: OK, I think I've finally escaped that scorching misery of a place... Oh! Wheels! Big ones AND small ones! Hmm...I bet the small ones are really maneuverable, but those big ones would be great for tough paths... Oooh, we Yiga have such good reflexes and balance, I bet we could even make a unicycle with these!
down.cn: 好吧，我想我终于逃离了那个酷热难耐的地方……哦！轮子！大的和小的都有！嗯……我敢打赌小的肯定很灵活，但大的在崎岖的路上会很好用……哦哦哦，我们依盖队的反应和平衡感那么好，我打赌我们甚至可以用这些做一个独轮车！

down.Description: OK, what is that glowing creature? Some kinda...bug. Maybe we could use it in an elixir that helps with the darkness down here... Gotta catch it first, but that'll be easy! Nothing is sneakier than a Yiga in their Yiga Clan clothes... Uuuh, what? Are you kidding me? Is that tree WALKING?!
down.cn: 好吧，那个发光的生物是什么？某种……虫子。也许我们可以用它来制作药剂，帮助应对这里的黑暗……得先抓住它，但这很简单！没有什么比穿着依盖队服装的依盖队成员更鬼祟的了……呃，什么？你在开玩笑吗？那棵树在走路？！

down.Description: This statue looks a lot like a Zora... Which means that statue of a woman I saw before was probably a Gerudo. And if I follow this statue, I'll probably find something man-made eventually too... I think I'm beneath the Lanayru region, but that'd mean the Depths are massive! I'll never finish exploring them...
down.cn: 这座雕像很像一个卓拉人……这意味着我之前看到的那座女人的雕像可能是一个格鲁德人。如果我跟着这座雕像走，我最终可能也会找到一些人造的东西……我想我在拉聂尔地区下面，但那意味着地底非常巨大！我永远也探索不完……

down.Description: So this is where all those Zora statues were leading me to... kinda like how the Gerudo statues pointed the way. Must be important! And sturdy, by the look of it. A perfect place for a Yiga Clan base!
down.cn: 所以这就是所有那些卓拉雕像指引我来的地方……有点像格鲁德雕像指路的方式。一定很重要！而且看样子很坚固。是依盖队基地的完美地点！

down.Voice Memory: What Lives in the Abandoned Mine?
down.Description: This thing was definitely moving! It withdrew the moment it noticed me, but I saw it! Its neck was all stretched out just like the pictures in the notebook! I can't believe something so ancient still works... Better take it with me. OK lift with your legs and— Oh, wow you're heavy! Never mind! The younger Yiga can haul this home.
down.cn: 这个东西肯定动了！它一注意到我就缩回去了，但我看见了！它的脖子伸得长长的，就像笔记里的图画一样！真不敢相信这么古老的东西还能用……最好把它带走。好吧，用腿发力——哦，哇，你好重！算了！让年轻的依盖队成员把它拖回家吧。

down.Description: Ho-ho, I knew it the moment I saw it—that red ooze is NOT good. It feels like part of my soul is being stolen right out of me at the slightest touch. And lately the stuff has been getting everywhere. BUT! I figured out the secret: don't touch it! And THAT is why the HOVERDOOM MK. 1 is the best thing ever.
down.cn: 嚯嚯，我一看到它就知道了——那红色的黏液不是好东西。感觉轻轻一碰，我的一部分灵魂就被抽走了。而且最近这东西到处都是。但是！我发现了秘密：别碰它！这就是为什么“悬浮末日一号”是史上最棒的东西。

down.Description: Turns out if I stare at Zonai letters long enough, I can learn to read them! It also turns out someone named Mineru wrote this notebook I found. They were apparently the last Zonai to manage this place... Anyway, I came here looking for prototype constructs, not a big owl statue. And that isn't a construct! Err...right?
down.cn: 原来只要我盯着左纳乌文字足够久，就能学会读它们！还发现一个叫米涅鲁的人写了我找到的这本笔记。他们显然是最后一个管理这个地方的左纳乌……总之，我来这里是找原型魔像的，不是找一个大猫头鹰雕像。而且那不是魔像！呃……对吧？

down.Description: All right, so instead of prototype constructs, this place is...empty. That's great. Not like I had plans to use everything I was gonna find... At least I have the schematics for Mineru's construct! I can just make that myself. A construct by me, for me. Heeheeheeheehee...
down.cn: 好吧，所以这里没有原型魔像，而是……空的。太棒了。又不是我本来就计划用上我能找到的所有东西……至少我有米涅鲁魔像的设计图！我自己就能造一个。一个由我制造、为我所用的魔像。嘻嘻嘻嘻嘻……

down.Description: So I thought Zonai devices were only good for getting around, but a fire-breathing dragon head? That's really...dangerous... Oh-ho, I have an idea! If I take this and some spikes and add them to my construct... Yes, YES! This could be amazing. This could be incredible! This could be..."Mecha Kohga 5000 - Deluxe"!
down.cn: 我原以为左纳乌装置只适合用来移动，但一个会喷火的龙头？那真的……很危险……哦嚯，我有个主意！如果我把这个和一些尖刺加到我的魔像上……是啊，是啊！这会很惊人。这会很不可思议！这会是……“机械可盖5000 - 豪华版”！

down.Description: So that last earthquake opened up a bunch of holes to the surface, and apparently Zelda has some new minions. They're calling themselves a "survey team"—boring—and they have started poking around down here in the Depths. Rude. RUDE! I was here first! I could erase them from existence the moment I see them, but... Maybe I should let them look around and see what they find? THEN erase them! HA!
down.cn: 上次地震在地表上打开了好多洞，显然塞尔达有了一些新的手下。他们自称“调查队”——真无聊——并且开始在地底这里到处乱逛。无礼。太无礼了！我先来的！我可以在看到他们的瞬间就让他们从世界上消失，但是……也许我应该让他们四处看看，看看他们能发现什么？然后再消灭他们！哈！

down.Description: Yeah, this is definitely the place the notebook mentioned. It says a construct here will let you use Zonai power to memorize and rebuild a design once it's been made. That would be really useful, except there's another one of those green crests! And it doesn't do anything! Grrr... Someone else can figure it out!
down.cn: 是啊，这绝对是笔记里提到的地方。上面说这里的一个魔像能让你用左纳乌的力量来记忆并重建一个已经做好的设计。那会很有用，只可惜这里又有另一个那种绿色的徽章！而且它什么用都没有！可恶……让别人去搞明白吧！

down.Description: It is a good day! I got a report from one of my spies in the survey team—they say the Demon King has awakened! And both Zelda and Link have gone missing! This is the perfect opportunity to show the Magnificent One that we, his best and most loyal retainers, are ready to support him!
down.cn: 真是个好日子！我从调查队的一个间谍那里得到报告——他们说魔王已经觉醒了！而且塞尔达和林克都失踪了！这是向那位大人展示我们——他最优秀、最忠诚的部下——已经准备好支持他的绝佳机会！

down.Description: Ahhhh... OK, the Yiga Clan knows where and how to build the base. They can handle the menial work from here. Meanwhile after I'm done soaking—I need to hurry to the Magnificent One. A meeting with him is not something I would leave to anyone else... Ahhh...
down.cn: 啊……好吧，依盖队知道在哪里以及如何建造基地。从现在开始，他们可以处理这些琐碎的工作。与此同时，等我泡完澡——我得赶紧去见那位大人。与他的会面，我可不会交给任何其他人……啊……

down.Description: I heard a reeeally interesting bit of news from one of my spies in the Zonai Survey Team. It seems there's lots of Zonai stuff down here because the ancient Zonai were digging all over the Depths to find an ore called Zonaite. Which must mean the place with the big furnace is an abandoned mine... And THAT obviously means this incredible source of energy was meant for me to control!
down.cn: 我从左纳乌调查队的一个间谍那里听到了一个非常非常有趣的消息。看来这里下面有很多左纳乌的东西，因为古代的左纳乌人在整个地底到处挖掘，寻找一种叫做左纳尼乌姆的矿石。那肯定意味着那个有大熔炉的地方是一个废弃的矿井……而那显然意味着这个不可思议的能源是注定要由我来控制的！

down.Description: It seemed really strange that the Rito statues ended abruptly, but turns out the entrance is on the surface, and it's right under Rito Village. Hmm... Maybe all the mines those statues point to are under big settlements? If that's true, we could employ some sneaky-sneaky stabby-stabby and attack from below while they're distracted. Magnificent One, I hope you approve of my incredibly clever plan!
down.cn: 利特族的雕像突然中止，这看起来真的很奇怪，但原来入口在地表，就在利特村的正下方。嗯……也许那些雕像指向的所有矿井都在大型聚落下面？如果这是真的，我们可以用些偷偷摸摸、刺刺杀杀的手段，趁他们分心的时候从下面攻击。大人，希望您能批准我这个绝顶聪明的计划！

down.Description: Grrr...ugh...heee... Almost... Gah! No good. Curse my banana gut! The price I pay for those lovely yellow fruits... Ugh, I just KNOW there's gotta be a great treasure if a Flux Construct is here. But no. Bananas are once again my undoing. I'm done with this. That treasure chest probably won't open anyway!
down.cn: 可恶……呃……嘿……就差一点……呀！不行。该死的我的香蕉肚！为了那些可爱的黄色水果我付出的代价……唉，我就知道如果这里有方块魔像，肯定有大宝藏。但是不行。香蕉又一次成了我的败因。我不干了。那个宝箱反正也可能打不开！

down.Description: Huh? What's that? It feels like something is overhead... And the wind... Did it just pick up? But I don't... Oh. OH! What's that?! It's hard to make it out but... Is that a dra...a dra...a dragon? HOW DID I NOT NOTICE A DRAGON?!
down.cn: 嗯？那是什么？感觉头顶上有什么东西……还有风……是刚才刮起来的吗？但是我没……哦。哦！那是什么？！很难看清楚，但是……那是一条……一条……一条龙吗？我怎么会没注意到一条龙？！

down.Description: Ho...hooo... That is a really big lake. Perfect for the Aquatic Division of the Yiga Clan. We'll have to move quickly to build more powerful water vehicles. And obviously we'll need to train Yiga to use them! We must be ready for whatever the Magnificent One needs!
down.cn: 嚯……嚯哦哦……那真是一个很大的湖。非常适合依盖队的水上部队。我们必须迅速行动，建造更强大的水上载具。而且很明显，我们需要训练依盖队成员来使用它们！我们必须为那位大人的任何需求做好准备！

down.Description: All of the monsters down here are so strong! Stronger than a hundred men! But...none of them listen to me! The moment I find one, I get attacked. I hate getting attacked! Annnd that's why I've launched the "Monster Training Program." Just as every child bonds with their parent, every monster I raise will bond with me! And they will serve the Demon King! Bwahaha—heeey! I'm not food! No I'm nooot. Stop biting meee.
down.cn: 这里所有的怪物都太强了！比一百个人还强！但是……没有一个听我的！我一找到一个，就被攻击了。我讨厌被攻击！所以，我启动了“怪物训练计划”。就像每个孩子都会和父母建立亲情一样，我养的每个怪物都会和我建立感情！他们将为魔王服务！哇哈哈——嘿！我不是食物！我不是。别咬我了。

down.Description: So there's a name for that red stuff I keep finding all over the Depths: gloom! I wish I'd known it was flowing from the Magnificent One—I would have just followed it to him! I can't now, though—the blasted stuff is all over the place and impossible to back track. Stupid no good... Errr... I mean... I like the Magnificent One's gloom! A lot! So much! the acoustics down here just made it SOUND like I was complaining. But I wasn't. Gloom gloom gloom!
down.cn: 原来我一直在地底到处发现的红色东西有个名字：瘴气！要是我早知道它是从那位大人那里流出来的——我早就跟着它找到他了！但现在不行了——这该死的东西到处都是，根本无法回头。愚蠢没用的……呃……我的意思是……我喜欢那位大人的瘴气！非常喜欢！非常非常喜欢！只是这里的音响效果让它听起来像我在抱怨。但我没有。瘴气瘴气瘴气！

down.Description: At first, I thought this was a giant Bokoblin—and I absolutely didn't even flinch at the sight—but it seems to just be a Statue... Hm? Hang on, is this the back? Why would there be a big Bokoblin face there? Could it be some kind of disguise? Hrm. Reminds me of that guy on the surface who makes monster masks.
down.cn: 起初，我以为这是一个巨大的波克布林——而且我看到它时绝对连眼睛都没眨一下——但它似乎只是一座雕像……嗯？等等，这是背面吗？为什么那里会有一个大的波克布林脸？难道是某种伪装？嗯。让我想起了地表上那个做怪物面具的家伙。

down.Description: I understand that the gloom is a blessing given to us by the Magnificent One...and that stepping on it is basically an insult to him. BUT... It's really gotten all over the place. I don't know how people on the surface avoid it, even if it is less thick up there. Wait. Could that mean... The Magnificent One must be in the Depths with us!
down.cn: 我明白瘴气是那位大人赐予我们的祝福……踩在上面基本上是对他的侮辱。但是……它真的到处都是。我不知道地表的人是怎么避开它的，即使那里的瘴气没那么浓。等等。那是不是意味着……那位大人一定和我们一起在地底！

down.Description: I'm willing to bet all my bananas that the Magnificent One is down here. The gloom is so thick...like a red oozy soup. But it's too thick for even the Yiga Clan to avoid it while searching. Wasn't there something one of my spies said about sundelions and the gloom? I'll need to look into that...
down.cn: 我敢用我所有的香蕉打赌，那位大人就在这下面。瘴气太浓了……就像红色的黏糊糊的汤。但它太浓了，连依盖队在搜索时都无法避开。我的一个间谍不是提过关于向阳草和瘴气的事吗？我得去查查……

down.Description: The notebook says this is where people wished for matchmaking. Or something... Well, in that case, I wish to meet the Demon King! Hm... Maybe there's a trick to it? I wish to meet the Demon King! I wish to meet the Demon King! I WISH TO MEET THE DEMON KING!
down.cn: 笔记上说这里是人们许愿求姻缘的地方。或者之类的……嗯，既然如此，我希望能见到魔王！嗯……也许有什么诀窍？我希望能见到魔王！我希望能见到魔王！我希望能见到魔王！

down.Description: Monsters and gloom don't seem to like the water in the Depths, making lakes the perfect place for bases! We've already got a perfect site up and running, and the Yiga are making progress using Zonai devices. They're turning out one schematic after another! Hahaha... But also I should really get to work on...Mecha Kohga 5000 - Deluxe!
down.cn: 怪物和瘴气似乎不喜欢地底的水，这使得湖泊成为基地的完美地点！我们已经有一个完美的基地在运行了，依盖队在使用左纳乌装置方面取得了进展。他们一个接一个地搞出了设计图！哈哈哈……不过我也该开始着手……机械可盖5000 - 豪华版了！

down.Description: Grrr... That cursed Link is back! I knew rumors of him vanishing were too good to be true! And where you find Link, you'll find someone pulling his strings! It can't be Zelda though. She's long gone from this world... Or is she? The royal family can be tricky... Hmmm. OK. Assume nothing, and only rest when I'm SURE the job is done!
down.cn: 可恶……那个该死的林克回来了！我就知道他失踪的谣言好得不像是真的！有林克的地方，就有人在背后操纵他！不过不可能是塞尔达。她早就离开这个世界了……或者她还在？王室的人很狡猾……嗯。好吧。不要做任何假设，只有在我确定任务完成时才能休息！

down.Description: Where could the Magnificent One be? We've searched high and low with nothing to— Hmm? Hey, you! Why are you in such a hurry? Slow down, there's no need to— What? The green crest? You've figured out how to make it work? Then we have to hurry to the Great Abandoned Central Mine! Hurry! GO FASTER!
down.cn: 那位大人会在哪里呢？我们上上下下都找遍了，什么也没——嗯？嘿，你！你为什么这么着急？慢点，没必要——什么？那个绿色的徽章？你搞清楚怎么让它工作了？那我们得赶紧去中央大废矿！快！再快点！
